ModMetaData.name: Medieval Vanilla Medicine
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Makes vanilla (industrial) medicine reachable in the medieval era. As a first step, this retunes the vanilla "Medicine production" research: its tech level becomes Medieval, its industrial prerequisites (Drug production, Microelectronics basics) are removed, and it instead requires Medieval Overhaul's Alchemy research.
